original_abstract: This article is derived from an MA dissertation in Heritage and Cultural Tourism concerning literary tourism as a developing genre and its potential within South Africa, which the author completed as a postgraduate student in the Department of Historical and Heritage Studies. Available at: http://hdl.handle.net/2263/29043
